name: geolocate_ip
description: Look up the geographic location of an IP address (IPv4 or IPv6) or domain name. Returns the country, region, city, latitude, longitude, ISP, ASN, and timezone. If no IP is provided, the caller's own IP is geolocated.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IPv4 address, IPv6 address, or domain name to geolocate. Omit to detect the caller's IP.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. Omit for all fields.

parameters.name: excludes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields or objects to exclude from the response.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Response language code (en, de, ru, ja, fr, cn, es, cs, it, ko, fa, pt). Paid plans only.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Additional modules to include: security, hostname, liveHostname, or '*' for all. Paid plans only.
